parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_type: 'budget_exceeded', severity: $('Check Budget').first().json.severity, message: $('Build Budget Alert').first().json.alert_title, details: { total_spend: $('Check Budget').first().json.totalSpend, daily_budget: $('Check Budget').first().json.dailyBudget, pct_used: $('Check Budget').first().json.pctUsed }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
